name: Summarize a Proposal
description: Turn a long client proposal or RFP response into a one-page summary that a busy executive can scan in two minutes: key offer, price, timeline, risks, and the recommended next move.
business_value: Saves 30-45 minutes of executive reading time per proposal and standardizes the brief format your sales leaders see across deals.

inputs.name: proposal_text
inputs.description: Paste the proposal body or upload its text.

inputs.name: client_name
inputs.description: Optional — used to personalize the summary.

inputs.name: summary_audience
inputs.description: Who is the summary for? Helps tune tone.

outputs.name: next_recommended_tasks
outputs.description: Suggested follow-ups (prepare counter, ask legal review, etc.).

changelog.summary: Initial release — bundled with the ops platform foundation.
